name: hb_3_18
requirements: As part of your analysis, for station 60 over 2025-06-08 08:00-18:00 compute and store: mean_pm10, max_pm10, mean_aqi (float), peak_pm10_offset_hours (whole hours from 08:00 to the PM10 peak, int).

turns.query: Analyze the combined impact of industrial emissions and meteorological conditions on PM10 levels at Zhengding Street Thermal Station (station_id: 60) during 2025-06-08 08:00:00 to 2025-06-08 18:00:00.
